_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+# This is a basic workflow to help you get started with Actions
+
+name: Build and Test (foxy)
+
+# Controls when the action will run. 
+on:
+  # Triggers the workflow on push
+  push:
+    branches: [ rolling ]
+
+  # Triggers the workflow on pull requests
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [ rolling ]
+
+  # Allows you to run this workflow manually from the Actions tab
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+# A workflow run is made up of one or more jobs that can run sequentially or in parallel
+jobs:
+  # This workflow contains a single job called "build"
+  build:
+    # The type of runner that the job will run on
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    container:
+      image: ubuntu:focal    
+
+    # Steps represent a sequence of tasks that will be executed as part of the job
+    steps:
+      - uses: ros-tooling/setup-ros@v0.3
+        with:
+          use-ros2-testing: true
+      - uses: ros-tooling/action-ros-ci@v0.2
+        with:
+          target-ros2-distro: foxy

+  # Triggers the workflow on pull requests
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [ rolling ]
+
+  # Allows you to run this workflow manually from the Actions tab
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+# A workflow run is made up of one or more jobs that can run sequentially or in parallel
+jobs:
+  # This workflow contains a single job called "build"
+  build:
+    # The type of runner that the job will run on
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    container:
+      image: ubuntu:jammy
+
+    # Steps represent a sequence of tasks that will be executed as part of the job
+    steps:

+      - uses: ros-tooling/action-ros-ci@v0.2
+        with:
+          target-ros2-distro: humble

+# This is a basic workflow to help you get started with Actions
+
+name: Build and Test (rolling)
+
+# Controls when the action will run. 
+on:
+  # Triggers the workflow on push
+  push:
+    branches: [ rolling ]
+
+  # Triggers the workflow on pull requests
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [ rolling ]
+
+  # Allows you to run this workflow manually from the Actions tab
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+# A workflow run is made up of one or more jobs that can run sequentially or in parallel
+jobs:
+  # This workflow contains a single job called "build"
+  build:
+    # The type of runner that the job will run on
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    container:
+      image: ubuntu:jammy
+
+    # Steps represent a sequence of tasks that will be executed as part of the job
+    steps:
+      - uses: ros-tooling/setup-ros@v0.3
+        with:
+          use-ros2-testing: true
+      - uses: ros-tooling/action-ros-ci@v0.2
+        with:
+          target-ros2-distro: rolling

data.author: dependabot[bot]
data.message:
Bump ros-tooling/setup-ros from 0.3 to 0.6

Bumps [ros-tooling/setup-ros](https://github.com/ros-tooling/setup-ros) from 0.3 to 0.6.
- [Release notes](https://github.com/ros-tooling/setup-ros/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/ros-tooling/setup-ros/compare/v0.3...v0.6)

---
updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: ros-tooling/setup-ros
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-minor
...

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
 
     # Steps represent a sequence of tasks that will be executed as part of the job
     steps:
-      - uses: ros-tooling/setup-ros@v0.3
+      - uses: ros-tooling/setup-ros@v0.6
         with:
           use-ros2-testing: true
       - uses: ros-tooling/action-ros-ci@v0.2

@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
 
     # Steps represent a sequence of tasks that will be executed as part of the job
     steps:
-      - uses: ros-tooling/setup-ros@v0.3
+      - uses: ros-tooling/setup-ros@v0.6
         with:
           use-ros2-testing: true
       - uses: ros-tooling/action-ros-ci@v0.2

@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:

+      - uses: ros-tooling/setup-ros@v0.6
         with:
           use-ros2-testing: true
       - uses: ros-tooling/action-ros-ci@v0.2

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# GC SPL
+# Game Controller SPL
 
 ROS2 Package to interface RoboCup Standard Platform League's Game Controller.

@@ -29,7 +29,7 @@ class GCSPL(Node):
     _host = None
     _RCGCD = None
 
-    def __init__(self, node_name='gc_spl', **kwargs):
+    def __init__(self, node_name='game_controller_spl', **kwargs):
         super().__init__(node_name, **kwargs)
 
         # Declare parameters
@@ -82,15 +82,15 @@ def __init__(self, node_name='gc_spl', **kwargs):
     def _setup_methods(self, rcgcd_version, rcgcrd_version):
         # RCGCD
         if rcgcd_version == 14:
-            from gc_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCD14 as RCGCD
-            from gc_spl.rcgcd_14.robocup_game_control_data import \
+            from game_controller_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCD14 as RCGCD
+            from game_controller_spl.rcgcd_14.robocup_game_control_data import \
                 GAMECONTROLLER_DATA_PORT
-            from gc_spl.rcgcd_14.conversion import rcgcd_data_to_msg
+            from game_controller_spl.rcgcd_14.conversion import rcgcd_data_to_msg
         elif rcgcd_version == 15:
-            from gc_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCD15 as RCGCD
-            from gc_spl.rcgcd_15.robocup_game_control_data import \
+            from game_controller_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCD15 as RCGCD
+            from game_controller_spl.rcgcd_15.robocup_game_control_data import \
                 GAMECONTROLLER_DATA_PORT
-            from gc_spl.rcgcd_15.conversion import rcgcd_data_to_msg
+            from game_controller_spl.rcgcd_15.conversion import rcgcd_data_to_msg
         else:
             self.get_logger().error('rcgcd_version ' + rcgcd_version + ' is not supported.')
         self.RCGCD = RCGCD
@@ -99,9 +99,9 @@ def _setup_methods(self, rcgcd_version, rcgcrd_version):
 
         # RCGCRD
         if rcgcrd_version == 4:
-            from gc_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCRD4 as RCGCRD
-            from gc_spl.rcgcrd_4.conversion import rcgcrd_msg_to_data
-            from gc_spl.rcgcrd_4.robocup_game_control_return_data import \
+            from game_controller_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCRD4 as RCGCRD
+            from game_controller_spl.rcgcrd_4.conversion import rcgcrd_msg_to_data
+            from game_controller_spl.rcgcrd_4.robocup_game_control_return_data import \
                 GAMECONTROLLER_RETURN_PORT
         else:
             self.get_logger().error('rcgcrd_version ' + rcgcrd_version + ' is not supported.')
@@ -139,8 +139,8 @@ def _rcgcrd_callback(self, msg):
 
 def main(args=None):
     rclpy.init(args=args)
-    gc_spl = GCSPL()
-    rclpy.spin(gc_spl)
+    game_controller_spl = GCSPL()
+    rclpy.spin(game_controller_spl)
     rclpy.shutdown()

@@ -12,9 +12,9 @@
 # See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
 # limitations under the License.
 
-from gc_spl.rcgcd_14.robocup_game_control_data import (
+from game_controller_spl.rcgcd_14.robocup_game_control_data import (
     MAX_NUM_PLAYERS, RoboCupGameControlData)
-from gc_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCD14
+from game_controller_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCD14
 
 
 def rcgcd_data_to_msg(data: bytes) -> RCGCD14:

-from gc_spl.rcgcd_15.robocup_game_control_data import (
+from game_controller_spl.rcgcd_15.robocup_game_control_data import (
     MAX_NUM_PLAYERS, RoboCupGameControlData)
-from gc_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCD15

-from gc_spl.rcgcrd_4.robocup_game_control_return_data import \
+from game_controller_spl.rcgcrd_4.robocup_game_control_return_data import \
     RoboCupGameControlReturnData
-from gc_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCRD4
+from game_controller_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCRD4
 
 
 def rcgcrd_msg_to_data(msg: RCGCRD4) -> bytes:

@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
 <?xml version="1.0"?>
 <?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
 <package format="3">
-  <name>gc_spl</name>
+  <name>game_controller_spl</name>
   <version>0.0.0</version>
   <description>GameController-Robot communication in RoboCup SPL</description>
   <maintainer email="kenjibrameld@gmail.com">ijnek</maintainer>

   <exec_depend>rclpy</exec_depend>

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+[develop]
+script_dir=$base/lib/game_controller_spl
+[install]
+install_scripts=$base/lib/game_controller_spl

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 from setuptools import find_packages, setup
 
-package_name = 'gc_spl'
+package_name = 'game_controller_spl'
 
 setup(
     name=package_name,
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@
     tests_require=['pytest'],
     entry_points={
         'console_scripts': [
-            'gc_spl = gc_spl.gc_spl:main',
+            'game_controller_spl = game_controller_spl.game_controller_spl:main',
         ],
     },
 )

+from game_controller_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCRD4 as RCGCRD
 
 
 def test_rcgcrd_msg_to_data():

-from gc_spl.gc_spl import GCSPL
-from gc_spl.rcgcd_15.robocup_game_control_data import RoboCupGameControlData
-from gc_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCD15 as RCGCD
-from gc_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCRD4 as RCGCRD
+from game_controller_spl.game_controller_spl import GCSPL

+from game_controller_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCD15 as RCGCD
+from game_controller_spl_interfaces.msg import RCGCRD4 as RCGCRD
